title: Easy Deepslate Mining
description: Tired of deepslate taking forever to mine? This mod fixes that by making every deepslate block mine as fast as stone, keeping the game fun while still feeling balanced.
body:
# Easy Deepslate Mining
Mining deepslate taking too long? This mod makes deepslate and all of its ore variants mine at the same speed as regular stone, making underground exploration much more enjoyable and less grindy.

# Features

Deepslate and deepslate ores mine at the same speed as stone

All deepslate block variants supported

Blast resistance remains unchanged

Fully compatible with both single-player and multiplayer worlds

# Affected Blocks

Deepslate

Deepslate Bricks

Deepslate Tiles

Polished Deepslate

Chiseled Deepslate

Deepslate Copper Ore

Deepslate Diamond Ore

Deepslate Emerald Ore

Deepslate Gold Ore

Deepslate Iron Ore

Deepslate Lapis Ore

Deepslate Redstone Ore

# Technical Details

This mod uses Mixins to modify the player’s block breaking speed when mining deepslate blocks, effectively matching them to stone while keeping their original blast resistance values intact.
